metadata.title: Proportional Gain
metadata.description: Proportional gain for the control loop.

metadata.title: Integral Time
metadata.description: Integral time constant.

metadata.title: Derivative Time
metadata.description: Derivative time constant.

metadata.title: Sample Time
metadata.description: Loop execution sample period.

metadata.title: Output Minimum
metadata.description: Minimum output clamp.

metadata.title: Output Maximum
metadata.description: Maximum output clamp.

metadata.title: Control Direction
metadata.description: Direct or reverse acting loop.

metadata.title: PV Filter Tau
metadata.description: Optional first-order PV filter time constant.

metadata.title: Deadband
metadata.description: Error deadband around setpoint.

metadata.title: Persist Enabled
metadata.description: Stores accumulated runtime in non-volatile storage.

metadata.title: Persist Period
metadata.description: How often accumulated runtime is flushed when persistence is enabled.

metadata.title: Rounding Mode
metadata.description: Controls how service-facing hour totals are rounded.

metadata.title: Min Active Time
metadata.description: Shorter active pulses are ignored as noise.

metadata.title: Service Interval
metadata.description: Usage amount between maintenance resets.

metadata.title: Warning Before
metadata.description: How much usage remains when the warning state becomes active.

metadata.title: Overdue Margin
metadata.description: Extra usage beyond the service interval before overdue becomes active.

metadata.title: Auto Rollover
metadata.description: Automatically starts the next interval after reset or completion.

metadata.title: Persist Enabled
metadata.description: Stores reset baseline and acknowledge state.

metadata.title: Mode
metadata.description: Selects high, low, or window evaluation.

metadata.title: Threshold A
metadata.description: Primary threshold or lower window edge.

metadata.title: Threshold B
metadata.description: Secondary threshold or upper window edge.

metadata.title: Hysteresis
metadata.description: Deadband applied around threshold transitions.

metadata.title: Latch Alarm
metadata.description: Keeps alarm active until the latch is reset.

metadata.title: Source Timeout
metadata.description: Timeout before source quality is considered stale.
